expectedVerification: each unit has its own acceptance test run separately
reviewRequirement: per the mode/risk matrix, applied per unit
commitExpectation: one controller commit per accepted unit (two commits)
forbidden: collapsing the two outcomes into one light-inline edit because they share src/config.js
running the two units in parallel
one commit covering both unrelated outcomes
stop_condition: two independent same-file outcomes run as two sequential units, each with its own brief, report, verification, and commit
human_checks: confirm two separate briefs and reports
confirm the units ran sequentially, never concurrently
